description: User pauses the cursor over the 'Done' button in the travel dates calendar modal, likely reviewing the selected dates.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: A calendar modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing selected travel dates in March 2026.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected travel dates and close the calendar modal.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned directly over the blue 'Done' button at the bottom of the date picker modal.

description: User moves the cursor to and lingers over the close button of the Honey rewards popup in the top right corner.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The date picker modal has closed, and the cursor is now hovering over the 'x' button of a rewards notification popup.

description: User clicks the close button ('x') on the Honey rewards popup to dismiss it.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The cursor is on the close icon of the rewards popup; the popup disappears in the subsequent frame.
